title: Ore Growth Compat Pack
description: Makes Ore Growth compatible with more modded ores.
body:
This datapack makes [Ore Growth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-growth) by SuperMartijn642 compatible with more modded ores. Currently, it includes:

* [Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze): Tin Ore
* [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment): Salt Ore, Silver Ore
* [Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/things): Gleaming Ore
* [Rethinking Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/rethinking-ores): Platinum Ore, Titanium Ore
* [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized) and [Oreganized Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized-refabricated): Lead Ore, Silver Ore

Supported ores will gradually grow crystals, which, when fully grown, can be mined for drops, equivalent to what you'd get by mining the ore itself. I've done my best to make the growth rates fit in with vanilla ores.
